name: mb-claude-skills
description: Maurice Blackburn's free Claude skills for the marketing team.

plugins.name: mb-brand
plugins.description: MB brand reference (colours, typography, logo, tone of voice, brand history) plus a conversational brand-vs-competitor comparison skill.

plugins.name: mb-social
plugins.description: Write, grade, and repurpose MB-branded social posts for LinkedIn, Instagram, TikTok, and Meta — on-brand voice, curated hooks, and legal-marketing compliance guardrails built in. Requires the mb-brand plugin installed alongside it.
